caption: A screen recording shows a presentation regarding the "Rural Community Food System." In the first two frames, a web browser displays a wiki page featuring a complex green systems diagram. The page includes a section titled "Introduction" and "References," with text such as "What constitutes a sustainable localized food system for a rural community source as local as possible from locally owned and operated businesses that benefit the community." A small video inset in the top right corner shows a man with short hair and a dark shirt. As the video progresses into the final two frames, the browser navigates to a new page with a white background. This page features the large centered text "Large Corporate Farm Systems" followed by "@ BrinoDRPM Still under construction and subject to revisions." The man remains visible in the top right corner, looking toward the screen.
